semantic.role: Define the syntax patterns for parsing Go source code into a structured symbol index
responsibilities: Specifying import, export, and usage pattern definitions for Go language constructs
Maintaining the mapping between source code patterns and their semantic kinds (Function, Class, Interface, Type, Variable)
outOfScope: Runtime execution or compilation of the matched patterns
User interface or visualization of the parsed results

English.purpose: This document defines the pattern-based grammar rules used by ArchSpine to extract structural symbols from Go source code. It specifies how imports, exports (functions, types, structs, interfaces, variables, constants), and usages (calls, selectors) are recognized and categorized.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers maintaining the ArchSpine parser or extending its language support. It serves as the canonical reference for Go pattern definitions, ensuring consistent symbol extraction across the codebase.
key_takeaways: Patterns are defined declaratively using a YAML-like structure with placeholders like $NAME, $ARGS, $BODY.
Each export pattern is assigned a semantic kind (Function, Class, Interface, Type, Variable) for downstream indexing.
Usage patterns capture how symbols are referenced (function calls, field/method selectors) to build dependency graphs.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档定义了 ArchSpine 用于从 Go 源代码中提取结构符号的模式化语法规则。它规定了如何识别和分类导入、导出（函数、类型、结构体、接口、变量、常量）以及用法（调用、选择器）。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于维护 ArchSpine 解析器或扩展其语言支持的开发者。作为 Go 模式定义的权威参考，确保整个代码库中符号提取的一致性。
key_takeaways: 模式使用类似 YAML 的声明式结构定义，包含 $NAME、$ARGS、$BODY 等占位符。
每个导出模式被分配一个语义种类（函数、类、接口、类型、变量），用于下游索引。
用法模式捕获符号的引用方式（函数调用、字段/方法选择器），以构建依赖关系图。
